steps.title: Identify the parabola's direction
steps.content: The parabola in the graph opens upward, so the leading coefficient of $x^2$ is positive. That eliminates A and B (both have $-\tfrac{7}{25}x^2$).

steps.title: Identify the line's slope
steps.content:
The line has a positive slope (rises left to \right).

Choice C has slope $-\tfrac{7}{5}$ (negative), but D has slope $+\tfrac{7}{5}$ (positive) — matching the graph.

So the system is $y = \tfrac{7}{25}x^2$ and $y = \tfrac{7}{5}x$.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
